Purpose: Convert new demand into structured follow-up or job/estimate path
Primary Trigger(s): new lead, email request, voicemail, web form, marketplace lead
Required Inputs: customer contact, request description, source, timestamp

Purpose: Recover revenue from unanswered phone demand
Primary Trigger(s): missed call with no callback within threshold
Required Inputs: caller ID, timestamp, voicemail/transcript if available
Metrics Updated: missed calls, callback latency, recovered jobs

Purpose: Prevent open quotes from going stale
Primary Trigger(s): estimate sent with no response, high-value estimate, stale estimate
Required Inputs: estimate amount, sent date, status, customer, owner
Metrics Updated: stale estimates, close rate, pipeline value
Success Condition: Estimate approved, declined with reason, or follow-up scheduled

Purpose: Convert approved work into scheduled job
Metrics Updated: approved not scheduled, time to schedule
Success Condition: Approved work scheduled or blocked with reason

Purpose: Prevent failed jobs from missing info, access, parts, or assignment
Primary Trigger(s): scheduled job missing required data or assignment
Required Inputs: job record, address, contact, scope, assigned tech, parts
Success Condition: Job ready or blocker resolved before appointment

Purpose: Maintain live operating view of field work
Primary Work Item Types: Status Check, Customer Update, Blocker Resolution
Evidence Required: status event, tech note if needed
Metrics Updated: stale jobs, blocked jobs, customer updates
Success Condition: Job state current and blockers routed

Purpose: Ensure completed work becomes evidence, invoice, review, and report-ready
Required Inputs: completion event, job notes, photos, signature, invoice status
Primary Work Item Types: Job Closeout, Missing Evidence, Invoice Follow-Up
Metrics Updated: closeout completeness, missing evidence, completed not invoiced
Success Condition: Job has required evidence and invoice path

Purpose: Resolve jobs blocked by parts or required return visits
Primary Trigger(s): parts needed, return visit required, part ordered without ETA
Required Inputs: part info, vendor, job, customer, ETA/status
Primary Work Item Types: Parts / Return Visit, Parts Follow-Up, Return Visit Scheduling
Evidence Required: tech note, order confirmation, return schedule
Metrics Updated: blocked by parts, return cycle time
Success Condition: Part sourced and return visit scheduled/completed

Purpose: Accelerate cash and reduce aging balances
Primary Trigger(s): completed not invoiced, unpaid invoice, payment dispute
Required Inputs: invoice status, due date, amount, job/customer, payment record
Primary Work Item Types: Invoice Follow-Up, Payment Follow-Up, Dispute Review
Evidence Required: invoice, payment record, job evidence for dispute
Metrics Updated: A/R aging, days to invoice, DSO

Purpose: Protect margin and identify quality issues
Primary Trigger(s): callback, warranty request, rework, repeated issue
Required Inputs: original job, customer complaint, warranty terms, evidence
Evidence Required: original job notes/photos, complaint, warranty proof
Metrics Updated: callback rate, rework cost, margin leakage
Success Condition: Callback resolved and root cause classified

Purpose: Rescue customer relationship and protect reputation

Primary Trigger(s): service due, renewal upcoming, maintenance opportunity
Required Inputs: agreement record, due date, customer/location, eligibility
Primary Work Item Types: Recurring Service Scheduling, Renewal Follow-Up, Service Opportunity
Metrics Updated: recurring due, renewal conversion, recurring revenue
Success Condition: Service scheduled, renewed, declined, or deferred

Primary Trigger(s): dormant customer list or reactivation signal
Required Inputs: customer history, last service date, eligibility

Purpose: Catch pricing, discount, refund, or job cost leakage
Primary Trigger(s): job margin exception, discount, refund, underpriced estimate
Primary Work Item Types: Margin Review, Discount Review, Refund Review
Success Condition: Exception reviewed and pricing/process action logged

Primary Trigger(s): expected source missing, stale data, source conflict, required field missing
Required Inputs: source, expected cadence, affected object, missing/conflicting fields
Primary Work Item Types: Data Pipeline Repair, Data Cleanup, Reconciliation
Evidence Required: sync logs, source records, missing field list
Metrics Updated: source health, data gaps, stale metrics
